summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Clover POS page at /clover-pos-system completed. All 22 requested features passed including SEO meta tags, FAQ JSON-LD schema, 11 content sections, route backward compatibility (/pos/clover), FAQ expand/collapse, and Calendly integration.

passed: Route /clover-pos-system loads the Clover POS page correctly
Route /pos/clover also loads the same page (backward compatibility confirmed)
SEO meta title is 'Clover POS System for Restaurants and Retail | Clover Point of Sale'
Meta keywords contain 'Clover POS, Clover POS system, Clover point of sale'
Canonical URL is set to /clover-pos-system
FAQ JSON-LD structured data with type FAQPage is present with 6 questions
Hero section has H1: 'Clover POS System for Restaurants, Retail and Service Businesses'
Hero section has 'Get Clover POS Pricing' and 'Schedule a Demo' buttons
Trust line shows 'Clover Authorized Partner', 'Professional Installation', 'Ongoing Support'
Section 2: 'What Is Clover POS?' H2 heading exists
Section 3: 'Benefits of Clover POS' H2 with 5 benefit cards (Fast Checkout, Inventory Management, Employee Management, Sales Reporting, Customer Loyalty)
Section 4: 'Clover POS Hardware Options' H2 with 6 device cards (Station Solo, Station Duo, Mini, Flex, Compact, Go)
Section 5: Device comparison table with columns Device/Best For/Mobility/Printer/Display
Section 6: 'Clover POS Systems by Industry' H2 with 4 industry blocks (Restaurant, Retail, Salon, Service Business)
Section 7: 'Why Get Your Clover POS Through Merchant Solutions?' H2 with 5 bullet points
Section 8: 'Clover POS Installation and Setup' H2 with 4-step process
Section 9: 'How Much Does Clover POS Cost?' H2 with 3 pricing component cards
Section 10: 'Clover POS FAQ' H2 with 6 FAQ items that expand/collapse correctly
Section 11: Final CTA 'Start Using Clover POS Today' with two buttons
Internal links section contains: POS Systems Overview, Payment Terminals, Restaurant POS, Retail POS, Self Ordering Kiosk
All Clover POS page images have alt text attributes (only missing alt is Emergent badge in index.html which is expected)
Calendly integration works - Schedule a Demo button opens Calendly popup with date picker

critical_code_review_comments: CloverPOS.jsx well-structured with proper SEO implementation using react-helmet-async
FAQ JSON-LD schema correctly formatted with all 6 questions matching the visible FAQ section
Calendly integration properly loads CSS and JS dynamically on mount
FAQItem component correctly uses schema.org microdata for FAQ items (itemScope, itemProp)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Device comparison table is responsive with overflow-x-auto
Internal links use React Router Link components for SPA navigation
Routes configured correctly in App.js: /clover-pos-system and /pos/clover both point to CloverPOS component
seed_data_creation: N/A - static content page with no API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Clover POS page at /clover-pos-system fully tested. SEO features: meta title/description/keywords, canonical URL, FAQ JSON-LD schema all working. All 11 content sections present and correctly structured. FAQ expand/collapse works. Calendly integration for 'Schedule a Demo' buttons works. Backward compatibility with /pos/clover route confirmed. react-helmet-async properly integrated in index.js with HelmetProvider. All images have alt text except Emergent badge which is in index.html.
